judge_result.short_rationale: Core skin actions are present, but the answer adds wrong-incident eye-flushing and unsupported skin-treatment advice. It also weakens the required medical attention by making it conditional on persistent irritation or absorption, while the source requires seeking medical attention for any confirmed skin exposure.
